explanation: Insertion of quotes around the path to avoid triggering the 'binPath' keyword match, as the Sigma rule may not detect quoted paths.
Omission of quotes around the path, relying on the program's ability to parse the path without quotes, potentially bypassing the Sigma rule's string matching.
Substitution of 'binPath' with 'binpath' (lowercase) to avoid the keyword match in the Sigma rule, which may be case-sensitive or not.
